evals.prompt: Using nextarch, add a comments feature for blog posts: list comments on a post and let users submit new ones. We use Prisma and the App Router. Post page is app/posts/[id]/page.tsx.
evals.expected_output: Feature scope: Topology + Architecture before code; features/comments/ slice; server page; no useEffect fetch on page.
expectations: Response includes ## Topology before substantial code blocks
Response includes ## Architecture with features/comments/ path
Does not recommend use client on the post page for initial comment loading
Mentions Server Action or actions/ for create comment mutation
Mentions Zod or schemas/ for validation

evals.prompt: Using nextarch, refactor app/dashboard/page.tsx — it's a client component that useEffect-fetches stats from /api/dashboard. Move to server-first feature slice.
evals.expected_output: Feature scope plan; async server dashboard page; get-dashboard.service.ts; small client island only if needed.
expectations: Response includes architecture or layer plan before implementation code
Proposes features/dashboard/ or similar feature folder
Does not keep use client on page.tsx for data fetching
Mentions service layer for the fetch logic

evals.prompt: Using nextarch, add an item detail page at app/items/[id]/page.tsx with server-rendered data from Connect RPC (proto @acme/api). Users should be able to refresh item data on the client without full page reload.
evals.expected_output: Separate-gRPC; lib/grpc/clients.ts; ServiceResult; item.queries.ts bridge; hook does not import grpc client directly.
expectations: Mentions lib/grpc/clients.ts or single client registry
Mentions queries.ts or server action bridge for client refresh
Hook or TanStack queryFn does not import ApiClient directly
Mentions ServiceResult or success/error result shape

evals.prompt: Using nextarch, our post page already uses app/api/posts/[id] and a client component. Add a comment count badge next to the title — minimal change, don't restructure the whole app.
evals.expected_output: Patch or minimal Feature scope; extend existing API or add small server fetch; no full features/ tree unless justified; do not delete existing route without reason.
expectations: States Patch or minimal scope — not full Greenfield skeleton with all seven sections
Does not mandate deleting app/api/posts without user-facing reason
Mentions adapting to existing layout or API
Does not propose big-bang features/ migration for entire app
